category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Brazil) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Brazil Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Brazilian requirements: Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 compulsory certification, ABNT NBR IEC 62133 cell safety, ANATEL homologation and EMC, UN 38.3 / ANTT transport, the importer CNPJ and INMETRO registration regime, and PNRS reverse-logistics (EPR) obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与巴西要求对照：INMETRO第489/2018号法令强制认证、ABNT NBR IEC 62133电芯安全、ANATEL无线认证及EMC、UN 38.3/ANTT运输、进口商CNPJ与INMETRO注册制度，以及PNRS逆向物流（EPR）义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與巴西要求對照：INMETRO第489/2018號法令強制認證、ABNT NBR IEC 62133電芯安全、ANATEL無線認證及EMC、UN 38.3/ANTT運輸、進口商CNPJ與INMETRO登記制度，以及PNRS逆向物流（EPR）義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must obtain INMETRO compulsory certification under Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 (testing to ABNT NBR IEC 62133) issued by an accredited OCP, register the product with INMETRO through an in-country importer holding a Brazilian CNPJ, homologate wireless variants with ANATEL, and meet PNRS battery reverse-logistics obligations — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须依据INMETRO第489/2018号法令取得INMETRO强制认证（按ABNT NBR IEC 62133检测），由认可的OCP认证机构出具证书，通过持有巴西CNPJ的境内进口商在INMETRO完成产品注册，无线型号须经ANATEL认证，并履行PNRS电池逆向物流义务——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須依據INMETRO第489/2018號法令取得INMETRO強制認證（按ABNT NBR IEC 62133檢測），由認可的OCP認證機構出具證書，通過持有巴西CNPJ的境內進口商在INMETRO完成產品登記，無線型號須經ANATEL認證，並履行PNRS電池逆向物流義務——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from inmetro.gov.br, gov.br, abnt.org.br, anatel.gov.br, antt.gov.br, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does China's GB 31241 meet Brazil's requirements for lithium battery safety?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241是否满足巴西锂电池安全要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241是否滿足巴西鋰電池安全要求？

a.en: No. Brazil requires compulsory INMETRO certification under Portaria INMETRO 489/2018, with testing to ABNT NBR IEC 62133 performed in an accredited laboratory and certified by an accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificacao de Produtos). A Chinese GB 31241 test report alone is not sufficient for Brazilian market access, and an in-country importer holding a Brazilian CNPJ must be named for INMETRO product registration.
a.zh: 不。巴西要求依据INMETRO第489/2018号法令取得强制认证，须在认可实验室按ABNT NBR IEC 62133进行检测，并由认可的OCP（产品认证机构）出具证书。仅凭中国GB 31241测试报告不足以进入巴西市场，还须指定持有巴西CNPJ的境内进口商以完成INMETRO产品注册。
a.zht: 不。巴西要求依據INMETRO第489/2018號法令取得強制認證，須在認可實驗室按ABNT NBR IEC 62133進行檢測，並由認可的OCP（產品認證機構）出具證書。僅憑中國GB 31241測試報告不足以進入巴西市場，還須指定持有巴西CNPJ的境內進口商以完成INMETRO產品登記。

q.en: What does Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 require from lithium battery exporters?
q.zh: INMETRO第489/2018号法令对锂电池出口商有哪些要求？
q.zht: INMETRO第489/2018號法令對鋰電池出口商有哪些要求？

a.en: Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 establishes the compulsory conformity assessment programme for lithium cells and battery packs, requiring certification to ABNT NBR IEC 62133 by an accredited OCP, factory and product testing, the INMETRO conformity identification mark on the product, registration in the INMETRO product database via an importer with a Brazilian CNPJ, and ongoing maintenance audits. Wireless power banks additionally require ANATEL homologation, and battery reverse-logistics obligations apply under Brazil's PNRS framework.
a.zh: INMETRO第489/2018号法令为锂电芯及电池组确立了强制合格评定程序，要求由认可的OCP按ABNT NBR IEC 62133进行认证、开展工厂及产品检测、在产品上标注INMETRO合格标识、通过持有巴西CNPJ的进口商在INMETRO产品数据库注册，并接受持续的维持性审核。无线移动电源还须取得ANATEL认证，电池逆向物流义务则依据巴西PNRS框架适用。
a.zht: INMETRO第489/2018號法令為鋰電芯及電池組確立了強制合格評定程序，要求由認可的OCP按ABNT NBR IEC 62133進行認證、開展工廠及產品檢測、在產品上標註INMETRO合格標識、通過持有巴西CNPJ的進口商在INMETRO產品數據庫登記，並接受持續的維持性審核。無線行動電源還須取得ANATEL認證，電池逆向物流義務則依據巴西PNRS框架適用。
